# Website48 - Professional Website Design Service in Singapore

> Website48 builds professional websites for Singapore SMEs in 48 hours for just $489.

## Quick Facts
- Service: Professional website design and development
- Location: Singapore
- Price: $489 SGD (one-time, includes 1 year hosting)
- Delivery: 48 hours
- Contact: WhatsApp +65 8012 4848
- Website: https://website48.com

## What's Included in $489
- Up to 5 pages
- Custom design tailored to your brand
- Mobile-responsive layout
- SEO-ready setup
- Domain setup assistance
- 12 months hosting & SSL
- Contact forms & Google Maps integration
- 30 days of support

## Add-On Services
- Single change: $19
- Unlimited changes forever: $148
- Additional page: $98
- Logo design: $48
- Multilanguage support: $148/language
- WhatsApp integration: $29
- Hosting renewal (after year 1): $29/month
- Blog integration: $148
- AI Chatbot: $148
- Multi-step lead form: $248
- Google Indexing & SEO: $98

## Who We Serve
Small and medium businesses in Singapore including:
- Restaurants and F&B
- Real estate agents
- Medical clinics
- Tuition centres
- Personal brands and portfolios
- Service businesses

## Why Choose Website48
1. Fixed price - no hidden costs or hourly billing
2. 48-hour delivery guarantee
3. Professional quality at SME-friendly pricing
4. WhatsApp support for easy communication
5. Singapore-based, understands local market
